ddls:
CREATE TABLE "continuum_of_care" (
  "coc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CoC region */,
  "coc_name" TEXT /* Name of the CoC region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the CoC region */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the CoC region is located */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the CoC region is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the CoC region is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annual_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annual report */,
  "coc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the CoC region the report belongs to */,
  "report_year" INTEGER /* Year the report was submitted */,
  "overall_homeless" INTEGER /* Overall homeless population in the CoC region */,
  "population_total" REAL /* Total population in the CoC region */,
  "housing_total" REAL /* Total housing units in the CoC region */,
  "persons_per_household" REAL /* Average persons per household in the CoC region */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_submission_date" TEXT /* Date the report was submitted */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., submitted, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annual_reports_coc_id FOREIGN KEY ("coc_id") REFERENCES continuum_of_care ("coc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., annual report, survey) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, Excel, JSON) */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source the collection belongs to */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "collection_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the data collection process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collections_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, data_access, report_generation) */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "coc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the CoC region the demographic data belongs to */,
  "report_year" INTEGER /* Year the demographic data was reported */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the homeless population (e.g., 18-24, 25-34) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the homeless population (e.g., male, female) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the homeless population (e.g., White, Black, Hispanic) */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Count of the homeless population for the demographic group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_coc_id FOREIGN KEY ("coc_id") REFERENCES continuum_of_care ("coc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_units" (
  "housing_unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing unit entry */,
  "coc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the CoC region the housing unit belongs to */,
  "housing_type" TEXT /* Type of housing unit (e.g., emergency shelter, transitional housing) */,
  "unit_count" INTEGER /* Number of housing units available */,
  "occupancy_rate" REAL /* Occupancy rate of the housing units */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("housing_unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_units_coc_id FOREIGN KEY ("coc_id") REFERENCES continuum_of_care ("coc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_sources" (
  "funding_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding source entry */,
  "coc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the CoC region the funding source belongs to */,
  "funding_type" TEXT /* Type of funding source (e.g., government grant, private donation) */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Amount of funding provided */,
  "funding_date" TEXT /* Date the funding was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funding_sources_coc_id FOREIGN KEY ("coc_id") REFERENCES continuum_of_care ("coc_id")
)
